pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: You again. Great. Except you are looking at me like a stranger.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: ...Ask Mira. I fix machines, not missing years.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: I just finished cleaning up the previous session.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Means I found tickets in places tickets should fear.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Machines are supposed to take quarters and make noise.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: These take memories and make paperwork.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Pixel Haven used to have more staff.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Then the schedule started looking like a ransom note.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: The one who ran the place built half these cabinets by hand.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Paid the light bill late so the games could stay a quarter cheaper.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Old staff. Old machines. Same floor stains.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Somehow I am still the one with a mop.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Some names you do not say until the person is ready to hear them.

pre_lost_token_flavor.speaker: Gus
pre_lost_token_flavor.text: Mira is at the counter if you need actual direction.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Gus
truth_filter_active.text: Once machines start correcting memories, they get picky.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Gus
truth_filter_active.text: Truth Filter is in Cabinet Row.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Gus
truth_filter_active.text: Mr. Byte is the one acting like he grades homework.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Gus
truth_filter_active.text: Mr. Byte can sort the lying cabinets.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Gus
truth_filter_active.text: Do not argue with a machine that owns red pens.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Gus
truth_filter_active.text: Let Mr. Byte tell you which memory is being dramatic.

truth_filter_active.speaker: Gus
truth_filter_active.text: Then come back before the door learns sarcasm.

circuit_soda_active.speaker: Gus
circuit_soda_active.text: Vendo has a machine for that, because of course he does.

circuit_soda_active.speaker: Gus
circuit_soda_active.text: Try not to let him sell you confidence in a can.

circuit_soda_active.speaker: Gus
circuit_soda_active.text: Your signal is leaking all over the place.

circuit_soda_active.speaker: Gus
circuit_soda_active.text: Vendo calls that a beverage-adjacent routing issue.

circuit_soda_active.speaker: Gus
circuit_soda_active.text: I call it a mop problem.

closing_shift_maintenance_followup.speaker: Gus
closing_shift_maintenance_followup.text: You made it. I pulled the closing sequence apart again.

closing_shift_maintenance_followup.speaker: Gus
closing_shift_maintenance_followup.text: Broken Score and Service Dash agree: the shutdown reached this hall.

closing_shift_maintenance_followup.speaker: Gus
closing_shift_maintenance_followup.text: The door can wait. First we bring the service line back safely.

static_service_full_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_full_intro.text: You made it. Broken Score and Service Dash agree that the shutdown ended here.

static_service_full_intro.speaker: Player
static_service_full_intro.text: So the route I followed leads to this service line.

static_service_full_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_full_intro.text: Yes. The recovered sequence gives me context, but the line itself is still dead.

static_service_full_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_full_intro.text: Restore its breaker cells and relays before we ask the Staff Door anything important.

static_service_full_intro.speaker: Player
static_service_full_intro.text: And after that, we look at what the door remembers?

static_service_full_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_full_intro.text: After that, we take one careful step. The rest can wait its turn.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_intro.text: You read the file. I can tell.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_intro.text: You have got the face people get after reading their own name somewhere they did not expect.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Player
static_service_run_intro.text: I did not see a name.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_intro.text: No. But you looked for one.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_intro.text: Lately you answer like your head is somewhere else. Like you say a thing, then wait to find out if you meant it.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_intro.text: The old late-shift used to make sure I clocked out before they did. Never the other way.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_intro.text: The file gives me enough to work with.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_intro.text: But the service route is dead.

static_service_run_intro.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_intro.text: Bring the system back before I ask the door anything important.

static_service_run_anecdote.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_anecdote.text: Now the building has opinions and electricity.

static_service_run_anecdote.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_anecdote.text: That is usually how repair bills become personal.

static_service_run_anecdote.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_anecdote.text: One repaired line does not erase years of overdue work.

static_service_run_anecdote.speaker: Gus
static_service_run_anecdote.text: Cleaner does not mean safe. It means we can take the next step.

maintenance_sync_intro.speaker: Player
maintenance_sync_intro.text: (A vending machine missed me. Now a door is listening. I am still deciding how I feel about being noticed.)

maintenance_sync_intro.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_intro.text: The door is arguing with its own lock.

maintenance_sync_intro.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_intro.text: Help me line up what it thinks it heard.

maintenance_sync_intro.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_intro.text: Then maybe it opens instead of judging us.

maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.text: I do not like doors that listen.

maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.text: It matched you against something in its log.

maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.text: Same access code answered twice. One answer held the door open. One begged it to close.

maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.text: I did not read the log. On purpose.

maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.text: Some doors grieve. This one files it under access control.

maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.text: Whoever ran this place carried it on a back that was already tired.

maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.speaker: Gus
maintenance_sync_completion_anecdote.text: I am calling that fixed because I want lunch.

hub_checkin_truth_filter.speaker: Player
hub_checkin_truth_filter.text: Gus. Has anything been talking in the hallways tonight?

hub_checkin_truth_filter.speaker: Gus
hub_checkin_truth_filter.text: Those speakers have been shot since before I started. They pop. They hiss.

hub_checkin_truth_filter.speaker: Gus
hub_checkin_truth_filter.text: Sometimes they do a thing I call the ghost cough. It is not a ghost.

hub_checkin_truth_filter.speaker: Gus
hub_checkin_truth_filter.text: It is a loose ground wire and forty years of nobody caring.

hub_checkin_truth_filter.speaker: Gus
hub_checkin_truth_filter.text: If it says anything clever, write it down. I will bill it.

hub_checkin_truth_filter.speaker: Gus
hub_checkin_truth_filter.text: ...One thing, though. Closing night left me a maintenance note I never had the guts to file.

hub_checkin_truth_filter.speaker: Gus
hub_checkin_truth_filter.text: It read wrong, and I did not want it to read right. Ask me again when I feel brave.

hub_checkin_truth_filter.speaker: Gus
hub_checkin_truth_filter.text: Anyway. Heard the Truth Filter howl from two rooms away.

hub_checkin_truth_filter.speaker: Gus
hub_checkin_truth_filter.text: It only howls when it loses the argument. That was its first loss on record.

hub_checkin_truth_filter.speaker: Gus
hub_checkin_truth_filter.text: Mr. Byte logged your win as an anomaly. He logs my lunch breaks the same way.

hub_checkin_truth_filter.speaker: Gus
hub_checkin_truth_filter.text: Meanwhile Vendo is rerouting power to itself again. That machine sulks when nobody visits.

hub_checkin_truth_filter.speaker: Gus
hub_checkin_truth_filter.text: Snack Alcove. It will flatter you. Do not tip it.

hub_checkin_prize_sort.speaker: Player
hub_checkin_prize_sort.text: Pip found a closing-shift code beneath the prize paint. They thought you might recognize it.

hub_checkin_prize_sort.speaker: Gus
hub_checkin_prize_sort.text: I do. It belongs to an inventory pass with a matching maintenance copy.

hub_checkin_prize_sort.speaker: Gus
hub_checkin_prize_sort.text: That gives me a shift to trace, but the witness list is damaged. I am not certain who saw which part.

hub_checkin_prize_sort.speaker: Gus
hub_checkin_prize_sort.text: Start with Mira. She closed the front counter and usually noticed who stayed behind.

hub_checkin_prize_sort.speaker: Player
hub_checkin_prize_sort.text: Mira first. If anything else feels familiar, I will take it slowly.

hub_checkin_prize_sort.speaker: Gus
hub_checkin_prize_sort.text: Good. I will sort the files here. Bring back whatever the arcade helps you connect.

closing_shift_echoes_debrief.speaker: Gus
closing_shift_echoes_debrief.text: You found all three? I only knew to send you to Mira.

closing_shift_echoes_debrief.speaker: Player
closing_shift_echoes_debrief.text: Mira did not know where the trail went. The score board felt familiar, and then the service line did too. I followed the feeling and found a one-minute shutdown sequence.

closing_shift_echoes_debrief.speaker: Gus
closing_shift_echoes_debrief.text: Then you may be remembering how to move through this place before you remember why.

closing_shift_echoes_debrief.speaker: Gus
closing_shift_echoes_debrief.text: You used to do that on the hardest nights: fix the next thing before admitting how much the whole place hurt.

closing_shift_echoes_debrief.speaker: Player
closing_shift_echoes_debrief.text: I would rather understand that slowly.

closing_shift_echoes_debrief.speaker: Gus
closing_shift_echoes_debrief.text: Fair. What we know now is enough: the timestamp and cutoff lead to the dead service line.

closing_shift_echoes_debrief.speaker: Gus
closing_shift_echoes_debrief.text: I unlocked the Maintenance Hallway. The service line is ready when you are.

static_run_replay_offer.speaker: Gus
static_run_replay_offer.text: The service route is alive and humming, thanks to you.

static_run_replay_offer.speaker: Gus
static_run_replay_offer.text: Want to run it again anyway? For fun.

static_run_replay_offer.speaker: Gus
static_run_replay_offer.text: Fun. A word I am relearning. Do not rush me.

static_run_replay_return.speaker: Gus
static_run_replay_return.text: Power held the whole way down.

static_run_replay_return.speaker: Gus
static_run_replay_return.text: You ran a live route for the joy of it. You used to do that, back when.

static_run_replay_return.speaker: Gus
static_run_replay_return.text: That is not forgetting. That is the good version of remembering.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: I recognized pieces of the old you.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: The way you checked exits before yourself.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: Did not know how to say that without making it worse.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: So I called it maintenance and kept moving.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: Still are, in the ways that matter.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: You always said routine was easier to carry than fear.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: Whole time you were the most scared one here, still sweeping up.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: You walked in with the part that still noticed strange lights and wanted to see what was inside.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: The other part remembered every exit, every unpaid repair, and every person depending on you.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: I recognize both. Same stubborn person. Different loads.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: A young heart does not mean being young enough to ignore bills. It means the bills do not get to decide what you are allowed to love.

post_reveal_witness.speaker: Gus
post_reveal_witness.text: I do not want to clean around another absence.
